info.title: Ecomapp Main-buildTime
info.description: Ecomapp is a comprehensive e-commerce API platform that provides endpoints for managing products, orders, users, and payments to facilitate online retail operations.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product catalog including creation, retrieval, updating, and deletion of products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Manage customer orders including order creation, status updates, and order history retrieval.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management operations such as registration, authentication, profile updates, and deletion.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Payment processing endpoints handling transactions, refunds, and payment method management.

get.summary: Retrieve the current shopping cart for a user
get.description: Fetches the current shopping cart contents for the specified user identified by userId. Returns all cart items, quantities, and totals if applicable.

400.description: Bad request - Invalid userId or request format

example.message: The provided userId is invalid.

details.issue: UserId format is incorrect or missing

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's cart
post.description: Adds a specified item with quantity and options to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. Accepts item details in the request body and returns the updated cart.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to add to the cart

200.description: Item successfully added to cart with updated cart response

400.description: Bad request - Invalid input or userId

example.message: One or more fields of the cart item are invalid.

details.issue: ProductId is required and should be a valid product identifier

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the user
post.description: Creates a new order based on the current cart or specified details for the user identified by userId. Returns the placed order details including order ID and status.

400.description: Bad request - Invalid userId or order details

example.message: The order placement request contains invalid or missing data.

details.issue: UserId does not exist or is invalid

404.description: Not found - User or cart not found

example.message: User or their shopping cart was not found.

details.issue: No cart found for specified userId

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve order details by order ID
get.description: Fetches detailed information about a specific order using the unique orderId. Includes items, status, payment info, and shipping details.

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid or malformed.

details.issue: OrderId does not match expected format

example.message: No order found with the specified orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process using the payment details provided in the request body. Returns payment authorization and status information.

requestBody.description: Payment details including amount, method, and order reference

example.message: Payment request contains invalid data or missing required fields.

402.description: Payment required - Insufficient funds or payment declined

example.message: Payment authorization failed due to insufficient funds or declined card.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Receives and processes webhook notifications from the payment gateway. The request body contains payment event details which are validated and used to update payment status accordingly. Returns a confirmation response upon successful processing.

requestBody.description: Payload representing the payment webhook event data

example.message: The webhook JSON payload is malformed or missing required fields.

details.issue: Amount field must be a positive number

402.description: Payment Required - Payment failed or unauthorized

example.message: The payment associated with this webhook has failed or is unauthorized.

500.description: Internal Server Error - Unexpected processing error

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the product catalog with details such as name, description, price, and inventory information. Returns the created product data upon success.

requestBody.description: Details of the product to be added

example.name: Wireless Headphones
example.description: Over-ear noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 20-hour battery life.

example.message: One or more fields in the product request are invalid.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the given SKU or name already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieves the current shipping and delivery status for the specified order. Requires the order ID as a path parameter. Returns tracking details including carrier, estimated delivery date, and shipment status.

404.description: Not Found - Order or tracking info not found

example.message: The specified order ID does not exist or has no tracking information.

details.issue: Order ID does not match any existing shipments

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Registers a new user in the system using the provided user details such as username, password, and contact information. Returns the created user's profile information upon successful registration.

example.message: One or more user fields are invalid or missing.
A user with the same username or email already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: The currency code for the cart item prices, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: Discount applied to the product price.

price.description: Original price of a single product unit before discounts.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product added to the cart.

currency.description: Currency code for all amounts in the cart.

items.description: List of items currently in the shopping cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount the user has to pay after discounts.

totalAmount.description: Total amount of all items before any discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to all items.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier for the user owning this cart.

discount.description: Discount applied on this order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for this ordered item.

productId.description: Unique identifier of the ordered product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created, ISO 8601 format.

currency.description: Currency code for all prices in the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Amount the user must pay after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current status of the payment (e.g., Pending, Completed).

status.description: Current status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered).

totalAmount.description: Total amount for the order before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to this order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update on the order, ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier for the user who placed the order.

amount.description: Total amount to be paid for the transaction

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the payment

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with this payment

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway to process the transaction

paymentMethod.description: Method of payment used (e.g., credit_card, paypal)

amount.description: Amount confirmed by the payment gateway

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created (ISO 8601 format)

currency.description: Currency code used in the payment

orderId.description: Identifier of the order for which payment was made

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for this transaction

transactionId.description: Identifier provided by the payment gateway for tracking

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway

paymentId.description: Unique payment identifier related to this webhook event

status.description: Updated status of the payment from the webhook

transactionId.description: Transaction ID for correlating with the payment gateway records

available.description: Indicates whether the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

description.example: A high-quality wireless headphone with noise cancellation

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

stock.description: Number of units of the product currently in stock

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase.

brand.description: The brand name of the product.

category.description: The category to which the product belongs.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the product was created.

currency.description: The currency code for the product price.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.
description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

productId.description: The unique identifier for the product.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product on a scale from 1 to 5.

stock.description: The quantity of the product available in stock.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the product was last updated.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the delivery.

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date and time in ISO 8601 format.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last update on the tracking information.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the associated order.

trackingId.description: Unique tracking identifier for the shipment.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

phone.description: User's phone number with country code.

preferredCurrency.description: The user's preferred currency code for transactions.

userType.description: Type or role assigned to the user.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the user account was created.

phone.description: User's phone number with country code.

preferredCurrency.description: The user's preferred currency code for transactions.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the user account was last updated.

userType.description: Type or role assigned to the user.

message.description: Detailed error message explaining the issue

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

path.description: Request path that caused the error

field.description: Name of the field with an issue

issue.example: must be a valid email address

message.description: Detailed error message explaining the server error

status.description: HTTP status code for the error
